footer.positioning: Secure-by-default project spaces for evidence readiness, documentation organization, customer-visible files, and private engineering docs.

hero.title: A clear home for machine project records
hero.description: BuildTrace starts with translated structure, secure-by-default positioning, and careful separation between customer-visible files and private engineering docs.

evidence.heading: Evidence-readiness structure
evidence.body: Project records can be organized for review without promising legal, safety, or regulatory outcomes.

documentation.heading: Documentation boundaries
documentation.body: Customer-visible files and private engineering docs stay clearly separated so future project work can remain understandable.

privacy.heading: Privacy-first placeholders
privacy.body: The Phase 1 shell reserves space for privacy information without adding accounts, storage, or customer data workflows.

security.heading: Secure-by-default direction
security.body: The interface sets expectations for secure project organization while deeper security controls remain future implementation work.

dataProtection.heading: Data protection planning
dataProtection.body: Customer-visible files and private engineering docs are described as separate areas before any document handling features are added.
